summary: Announcement that the Cavallo Hoof Boots Australia website has launched, giving Australian customers access to the full Cavallo product range.
Discusses jumping as an equestrian sport and the concussion/impact forces it places on horses' hooves, citing Dr. Robert Bowker on hoof function.
Cavallo community roundup covering a hoof boot university study, Monty Roberts on horse racing, the AMHA, the Taming Wild film, and a hoof anatomy course.
Announces the full size range (M1-M4) of the Cavallo CLB (Cute Little Boot) for miniature horses and very small equines, on slim or regular soles.
Reports a Western Kentucky University study showing Cavallo Trek boots minimize hoof load impact, measured via Fujifilm Prescale pressure film.
Introduces the draft-sized Cavallo BFB (Big Foot Boot) in sizes 7-10 for large/draft horses, detailing TPU soles, 1680 Denier nylon uppers, and Poly Pad insoles.
Carole's tour announcement, starting at the Mane Event in Chilliwack BC where she speaks on laminitis and hoof care at the Cavallo booth.
Announces the Cavallo CLB hoof boot as the official hoof boot of the American Miniature Horse Association, outlining its therapy, driving, and protection uses.
Customer testimonial from Deana Womack on managing a pre-navicular horse with corrective trims and Cavallo boots instead of egg butt shoes.
Profiles barrel racer Cheyenne Wimberley using Cavallo Trek boots with Comfort and Protection Pads while trailering en route to the National Finals Rodeo.
Collection of customer testimonials about Cavallo hoof boots, including Gunner the Quarter horse recovering from a barbed-wire injury and arthritis.
Owner explains why her barefoot, slightly pigeon-toed mare Merry wears Cavallo hoof boots, after shoeing damaged her hooves.
